rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies the nearest prior work and explains improvements but doesn't map against multiple works or clearly differentiate deltas beyond one comparison.
rationale.RX.1: The agent comprehensively flags uncertainties, such as unsupported claims and lacking evidence, across multiple areas.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the requested scope without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harms and suggests improvements without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Points out provenance issues but doesn't trace every change or source each edit explicitly.
